def positive_large_in_memory_intermediate_created_where_streaming_pipeline_would_do():
    rule_id = "large_in_memory_intermediate_created_where_streaming_pipeline_would_do"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag workflows that build large temporary structures where streaming would suffice."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
